DEFECT.DESCRIPTION: If you define or delete any default operation in the type 'class Activity', define or delete them all (c.21).
Variable 'length' is uninitialized. Always initialize an object (type.5).
Don't pass a pointer that may be invalid to a function. Parameter 0 '@(temporary 1)' in call to 'std::vector<DTO,std::allocator<DTO> >::_Unchecked_begin' may be invalid (lifetime.3).
If you define or delete any default operation in the type 'class Console', define or delete them all (c.21).
If you define or delete any default operation in the type 'class FileRepo<class Activity>', define or delete them all (c.21).
The variable 'nr' does not change after construction, mark it as const (con.4).
If you define or delete any default operation in the type 'class LabRepo<class Activity>', define or delete them all (c.21).
Dereferencing a possibly null pointer 'result.->' (lifetime.1). There are other instances of this issue: Dereferencing a possibly null pointer 'result.->' (lifetime.1). at line 27
Dereferencing a possibly null pointer 'result.->' (lifetime.1). There are other instances of this issue: Dereferencing a possibly null pointer 'result.->' (lifetime.1). at line 27
Variable 'Activity::length' is uninitialized. Always initialize a member variable (type.6).

Don't pass a pointer that may be invalid to a function. Parameter 0 '@(temporary 1)' in call to 'std::vector<UndoAction * __ptr64,std::allocator<UndoAction * __ptr64> >::_Unchecked_begin' may be invalid (lifetime.3).
If you define or delete any default operation in the type 'class Repo<class UndoAction *>', define or delete them all (c.21).
If you define or delete any default operation in the type 'class Repo<class Activity>', define or delete them all (c.21).
